youtube_title: Czechia 1-1 South Africa: Controversial Penalty Keeps Bafana Bafana Alive | World Cup 2026
youtube_description:
South Africa were 7 minutes from elimination. Then a controversial penalty changed everything.

83 minutes. 17 shots. 62% possession. And finally — a lifeline.

Teboho Mokoena's spot-kick keeps Bafana Bafana's World Cup alive in Group A. But was it a handball?

#WorldCup2026 #SouthAfrica #Czechia #BafanaBafana #FIFAWorldCup #TikiTakaFootyTV
